Introduction
    After watching a documentary about "retired" high jumper Tso Yi-Chuan (Chun Wu), Lu Jui-Hsi (Ella Chen) is so determined to meet him that she disguises herself as a boy in order to transfer to his all-male school, Ying Kai Univers...

Filming locations: National Chi Nan University, Puli, Nantou County, Taiwan
Production companies: Xian Longrui Film And TV Culture Media Co.
